query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_users (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  organization VARCHAR(255),
  role VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'expired', 'converted') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  trialStartedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  trialExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalSessions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalTimeSpentSeconds INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastLoginAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  convertedToUserId INT,
  convertedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  wantsUpdates BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_users (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  organization VARCHAR(255),
  role VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'expired', 'converted') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  trialStartedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  trialExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalSessions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalTimeSpentSeconds INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastLoginAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  convertedToUserId INT,
  convertedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  wantsUpdates BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
